title: Luminous Power Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Luminous Power Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
